title: Session complete — Marketa golden path + passport wizard + Polity Passport menu
body: Branch claude/optimistic-davinci-exiykx, all merged to dev. Shipped: (1) Marketa golden path 5/5 — opportunities CRUD + revenue roll-up, Mailjet outreach send + reply flip, subscription MRR semantics, discovery automation (a2a_card/mcp_registry sources), per-lane outreach template library + in-cartridge manager, lane/source revenue attribution. (2) Operator batch — Reputation label, pink copilot accent, green glass passport badges + W3C VC claim pill, USD/Qc display, SmartTriad KB fallback chain aigentMe>metaMe>aigentC>aigentZ (aigent-marketa unpinned from metaKnyts KB), Gmail 1:1 send path, passport auto-sync + awaiting-steward flagging, Polity Passport as first-class AgentiQ menu (steward admin-gated), citizen/participant apply wizard with bounded-delegation agent binding, Cloudflare Turnstile widget + env allowlist. (3) Audit fixes — Gmail personaId 422, passport auto-sync infinite request loop. Operator TODOs: Turnstile keys in Amplify, marketa_outreach_templates migration, CRM bridge decision, aigentMe/metaMe KB population.
